title: C2G 88513 2 Metre UK Power Cable (IEC320C13 to BS 1363) 6 Foot Kettle Lead/Power Cord, Black
features: Replace your overused or misplaced power cable. This universal power cable is designed to work with most PC's, monitors, scanners, printers, projectors and musical/audio equipment.
C2G 2 Metre 3 pin plug Power cable features a heavy duty cord, fully snagless design for maximum durability and long life
Connector 1, BS 1363 Male UK 3 pin plug. Connector 2, C13 IEC Female Power Cable Connector. Also known as a kettle lead / kettle plug.
Fitted with a replaceable 10 Amp fuse, Outer Diameter 6.7mm +/- .2mm
Lifetime guarantee, All C2G electrical cables are designed and tested here in the UK to the highest standards. Fully compliant.
Note: Please ensure a c13 10amp fused power cable is suitable. Most high temp devices require a C15 power lead.
description: Product Description C2G UK AC Power Cable IEC320 C13 to BS 1363 UK Plug, Kettle Lead/Power Cord Replace your overused or misplaced power cable. This universal power cable is designed to work with most desktop PC's, monitors, scanners, printers, treadmills and musical/audio equipment and other devices that use the 3-pin shroud power connector. This flexible, heavy duty cord features a fully snagless design for maximum durability and long life. The female connector plugs directly into the device while the male UK 3 pin plug connects into a standard outlet. C2G 3 pin plug power cable features a heavy duty cord, fully snag-less design for maximum durability and long life. Connector 1 BS 1363 male UK 3 pin plug. Connector 2 C13 IEC Female power cable. Also known as a kettle lead / kettle plug, the C2G power cable will fit most household appliances. Fitted with a replaceable 10 amp fuse, Outer Diameter: 6.7mm ± 0.2mm. Connectors: 3-pin shroud female (IEC-320-C13) to 3-prong grounded plug male (BS 1363) ROHS compliant / BS1363 Compliant. Compatibility: Computers, monitors, scanners, printers, and other devices that use a 3-pin shroud power connector Note: Please ensure a C13 10amp fused power cable is suitable. Most high temp devices require a C15 power lead.
